mapper.select:
SELECT TD.maTuyen, TD.diemKhoiHanh, TD.diemDen, TD.khoangCach, TD.thoiGianUocTinh, TD.doPhucTap, TD.maLuongTuyen, TD.heSoDuongKho, LTD.luongCoBan FROM tuyenduong TD LEFT JOIN luongtuyenduong LTD on TD.maLuongTuyen = LTD.maLuongTuyen where 1 = 1
AND TD.diemKhoiHanh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{diemKhoiHanh}, '%')
AND TD.diemDen LIKE CONCAT('%', #{diemDen}, '%')
ORDER BY TD.maTuyen desc
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT count(*) FROM tuyenduong TD LEFT JOIN luongtuyenduong LTD on TD.maLuongTuyen = LTD.maLuongTuyen where 1 = 1
AND TD.diemKhoiHanh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{diemKhoiHanh}, '%')
AND TD.diemDen LIKE CONCAT('%', #{diemDen}, '%')

SELECT TD.maTuyen, TD.diemKhoiHanh, TD.diemDen, TD.khoangCach, TD.thoiGianUocTinh, TD.doPhucTap, TD.maLuongTuyen, TD.heSoDuongKho, LTD.luongCoBan FROM tuyenduong TD LEFT JOIN luongtuyenduong LTD on TD.maLuongTuyen = LTD.maLuongTuyen WHERE TD.maTuyen = #{maTuyen}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tuyenduong (diemKhoiHanh, diemDen, khoangCach, thoiGianUocTinh, doPhucTap,maLuongTuyen, heSoDuongKho) VALUES (#{diemKhoiHanh}, #{diemDen}, #{khoangCach}, #{thoiGianUocTinh}, #{doPhucTap}, #{maLuongTuyen}, #{heSoDuongKho})
mapper.update: UPDATE tuyenduong SET diemKhoiHanh = #{diemKhoiHanh}, diemDen = #{diemDen}, khoangCach = #{khoangCach}, thoiGianUocTinh = #{thoiGianUocTinh}, doPhucTap = #{doPhucTap}, maLuongTuyen = #{maLuongTuyen}, heSoDuongKho = #{heSoDuongKho} WHERE maTuyen = #{maTuyen}
